events.context: Chicago trip for Mariano's 30th birthday (March 19). Plan includes 1-2 night backpacking trip first, then Chicago celebration. Flights booked.

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana (Mar 23–Apr 7). Route: Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Shopping for eyeglasses (4 pairs) and fountain pens.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto, validate insurance/prescription requirements, finalize activity plans for each city.
